label: Micronutrient Calculator
description: Calculates daily micronutrient targets (vitamins and minerals) based on age, sex, weight, pregnancy/lactation status, and health focus. Feeds targets into meal planning, inventory/storehouse, and recipe selection.

planningGraph.graphDescription: Determine daily vitamin and mineral requirements and expose them to the Planning Graph so meals, storehouse, and session planning can align with nutrient coverage goals.

from.health.bmi: Use BMI and category to fine-tune certain micro targets (e.g., joint, heart, blood pressure support).
from.health.macros: Align micronutrient distribution with dominant macro pattern (high protein, higher fiber, etc.).
from.health.bmr: Use metabolic load to prioritize energy-related micronutrients (B vitamins, iron, magnesium).
from.profile.household: Age, sex, pregnancy/lactation and known conditions influence micronutrient baselines.
from.inventory.storehouse: Current pantry and storehouse items constrain real-world achievable micronutrient plans.

to.meals.planner: Tag recipes and meals with micro coverage; prioritize combinations that close the biggest gaps.
to.meals.batchCooking: Suggest batch sessions that cover chronic micronutrient gaps over a week/month.
to.storehouse.nutritionGaps: Identify missing nutrient categories and map them to storehouse stocking targets.
to.health.tracker: Track achieved vs target micronutrient intake over time.
to.health.goals: Translate gaps into practical goals (e.g., 'hit iron target 5 days/week').

ui.sectionSubtitle: Daily vitamin and mineral targets for your household
